name: Hangzhou Prevail Optoelectronic Equipment Co., Ltd.
summary: Hangzhou Prevail Optoelectronic Equipment Co., Ltd. researches, develops, and produces CATV equipment. It offers HFC optical fiber transmission products, such as switches, as well as optical receivers, amplifiers, transmitters, platforms, and optical nodes. The company also provides CATV coaxial cable transmission products comprising bidirectional building and outdoor bi-directional amplifiers, power supplies, and taps and splitters; and digital TV equipment consisting of DVB/IP stream processing devices, encoders, DVB sourcers and adapters, IPTV stream platforms, and other equipment. In addition, it offers EPON and GPON optical network equipment; PTN transmission equipment; industrial Ethernet switches; Ethernet testers; and network management software. The company sells its products in China, Europe, North America, and internationally. Hangzhou Prevail Optoelectronic Equipment Co., Ltd. is based in Hangzhou, China.
